functions.name: ChatPaneInterface
params:
{
	paneId,
	sessionId,
	initialLaunchConfig,
	workspaceId,
	organizationId,
	cwd,
	isFocused,
	isSessionReady,
	ensureSessionReady,
	onStartFreshSession,
	onConsumeLaunchConfig,
	onUserMessageSubmitted,
}

functions.name: useMcpUi
params:
{
	cwd,
	loadOverview,
	authenticateServer,
	onSetErrorMessage,
	onClearError,
	onTrackEvent,
	pollIntervalMs = 5_000,
}

functions.name: sendMessageForSession
params:
{
	currentSessionId,
	isSessionReady,
	ensureSessionReady,
	onStartFreshSession,
	sendToCurrentSession,
	sendToSession,
}
